'''moraraka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:stabled|stabled]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-r-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stabled|stabled]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| moraraka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:morarithi|morarithi]] || [[word:morariji|morariji]] || [[word:morarishi|morarishi]] || [[word:morariki|morariki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:moraruthuthu|moraruthuthu]] || [[word:morarujuju|morarujuju]] || [[word:morarushushu|morarushushu]] || [[word:morarukuku|morarukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:moraruthu|moraruthu]] || [[word:moraruju|moraruju]] || [[word:morarushu|morarushu]] || [[word:moraruku|moraruku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:morarufthuf|morarufthuf]] || [[word:morarufjuf|morarufjuf]] || [[word:morarufshuf|morarufshuf]] || [[word:morarufkuf|morarufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:morarethe|morarethe]] || [[word:morareje|morareje]] || [[word:morareshe|morareshe]] || [[word:morareke|morareke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:morarothotho|morarothotho]] || [[word:morarojojo|morarojojo]] || [[word:moraroshosho|moraroshosho]] || [[word:morarokoko|morarokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:morarotho|morarotho]] || [[word:morarojo|morarojo]] || [[word:morarosho|morarosho]] || [[word:moraroko|moraroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:morarofthof|morarofthof]] || [[word:morarofjof|morarofjof]] || [[word:morarofshof|morarofshof]] || [[word:morarofkof|morarofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:morarÃŸfthÃŸf|morarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:morarÃŸfjÃŸf|morarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:morarÃŸfshÃŸf|morarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:morarÃŸfkÃŸf|morarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:morarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|morarÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:morarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|morarÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:morarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|morarÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:morarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|morarÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:morarÃŸfthÃŸf|morarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:morarÃŸfjÃŸf|morarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:morarÃŸfshÃŸf|morarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:morarÃŸfkÃŸf|morarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:morarÃŸfthÃŸf|morarÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:morarÃŸfjÃŸf|morarÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:morarÃŸfshÃŸf|morarÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:morarÃŸfkÃŸf|morarÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:morarÃḊthÃḊ|morarÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:morarÃḊjÃḊ|morarÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:morarÃḊshÃḊ|morarÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:morarÃḊkÃḊ|morarÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:morarathatha|morarathatha]] || [[word:morarajaja|morarajaja]] || [[word:morarashasha|morarashasha]] || [[word:morarakaka|morarakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:moraratha|moraratha]] || [[word:moraraja|moraraja]] || [[word:morarasha|morarasha]] || [[word:moraraka|moraraka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:morarafthaf|morarafthaf]] || [[word:morarafjaf|morarafjaf]] || [[word:morarafshaf|morarafshaf]] || [[word:morarafkaf|morarafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:morarasha|morarasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:morarshÃḋsha|morarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:morarosha|morarosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:morarmusha|morarmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:moraryasha|moraryasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomorarnkshÃḋsha|gomorarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomorarnkrosha|gomorarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomorarnkmusha|gomorarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomorarnkyasha|gomorarnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:morararasha|morararasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:morararshÃḋsha|morararshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:morararosha|morararosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:morararmusha|morararmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:morararyasha|morararyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomorararnkshÃḋsha|gomorararnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomorararnkrosha|gomorararnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomorararnkmusha|gomorararnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomorararnkyasha|gomorararnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:merÃḊrasha|merÃḊrasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:merÃḊrshÃḋsha|merÃḊrshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:merÃḊrosha|merÃḊrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:merÃḊrmusha|merÃḊrmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:merÃḊryasha|merÃḊryasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomerÃḊrnkshÃḋsha|gomerÃḊrnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomerÃḊrnkrosha|gomerÃḊrnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomerÃḊrnkmusha|gomerÃḊrnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomerÃḊrnkyasha|gomerÃḊrnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:morfarasha|morfarasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:morfarshÃḋsha|morfarshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:morfarosha|morfarosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:morfarmusha|morfarmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:morfaryasha|morfaryasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomorfarnkshÃḋsha|gomorfarnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gomorfarnkrosha|gomorfarnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomorfarnkmusha|gomorfarnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gomorfarnkyasha|gomorfarnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
